title: Property Consultant - Gera Developments - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Property Consultant - Gera Developments - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
Gera Developments, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Property Consultant for our Pimpri-Chinchwad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Gera Developments:
Gera Developments is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in CRM Software

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Gera Developments!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
